subject: Mathematics
topic: Choose the most efficient package option

task_sheet.title: Option Selection Record
instructions: Use compact selection marks, not full prose.
Choose the single best option where the task asks for one choice.

tasks.label: Part A
tasks.prompt: Select the package option that seems most efficient right now.

tasks.label: Part B
tasks.prompt: Choose one option in each comparison row.

render_hints.heading: Choose one option in each row

tasks.label: Part C
tasks.prompt: Give one brief checkpoint response about why your selected option seems strongest.

render_hints.heading: Quick checkpoint
render_hints.help: Keep this to one or two short lines.

embedded_supports: Use the selector rows for choices, not explanations.
Use the checkpoint only for a brief reason.
success_criteria: I kept my checkpoint response brief.
